name: fast-context-skill
description: Agent Skill and CLI adaptation of fast-context-mcp that runs Windsurf Devstral semantic code search without an MCP server.

scripts.test: node --check skills/fast-context/scripts/fast-context-search.mjs && node --check skills/fast-context/scripts/lib/core.mjs && node skills/fast-context/scripts/fast-context-search.mjs --help >/dev/null && node test/cli.mjs
